phrases.intent_en: Where is the old whaling factory?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a antiga fábrica baleeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ahnng-TEE-guh FAHB-ree-kuh buh-LEEAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic site repurposed for cultural events.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Antiga Fábrica da Baleia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ahnng-TEE-guh FAHB-ree-kuh DUH buh-LAYUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Old Whale Factory.

responses.local: Siga as placas para a Antiga Fábrica da Baleia.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH DUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Cais da Madalena is the main marina dock, a hub for boats and waterfront activities.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o cais da marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH muh-REE-nuh.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH DUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Active dock for local fishing and tourist vessels.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Rua da Madalena, lado mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DUH muh-duh-LEH-nuh, LAH-doo MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on Rua da Madalena, sea side.

responses.english: Good morning, on Rua da Madalena, sea side.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DUH muh-duh-LEH-nuh, LAH-doo MAHR.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the boat tour ticket counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde é o balcão de bilhetes para o passeio de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO DIH BAH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Ponta Delgada's maritime heritage makes boat tours central to the area.

likely_response.local: O balcão de bilhetes fica no cais.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh FEE-kuh NOO KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket counter is at the pier.

responses.english: The ticket counter is at the pier.
responses.phonetic: AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh FEE-kuh NOO KEYESH.
responses.local: O balcão de bilhetes fica no cais.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the old whaling factory?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a antiga fábrica baleeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee FEE-kah ah ahn-TEE-gah FAH-bree-kah bah-LAY-rah
phrases.cultural_note: The old whaling factory is a historical landmark in the neighborhood, reflecting the area's maritime heritage.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the boat tour ticket counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de bilhetes do passeio de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO puh-SAYOO DIH BAH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Boat tour tickets are sold at the marina dock, a central point for maritime excursions.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Capitão de passeio no cais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW kuh-pee-TOWN DIH puh-SAYOO NOO KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the boat captain at the dock.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW kuh-pee-TOWN DIH puh-SAYOO NOO KEYESH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao Capitão de passeio no cais.
